message:
feat(component): Implement process wrapper functions for Component Model

Phase 6: Process Interface - Step 3 Complete

Created process_impl.zig with all 6 wrapper functions:

1. spawn-sync() - Synchronous process execution
   - Uses wasi_process.zig API (set_prog_name, add_arg, add_stdin, set_timeout, run)
   - Captures stdout/stderr and exit code
   - Returns result<process-output, process-error>

2. exec-sync() - Shell command execution
   - Parses command string into program + args
   - Delegates to spawn-sync()

3. spawn-start() - Async spawn initiation
   - Calls __edgebox_spawn_dispatch with SPAWN_OP_START
   - Returns spawn ID for polling
   - Returns result<u32, process-error>

4. spawn-poll() - Poll async spawn status
   - Returns 0 (running), 1 (complete), or error
   - Uses SPAWN_OP_POLL opcode

5. spawn-output() - Get async spawn output
   - Gets JSON output via SPAWN_OP_OUTPUT_LEN and SPAWN_OP_OUTPUT
   - Parses JSON to ProcessOutput struct
   - Returns result<process-output, process-error>

6. spawn-free() - Free async spawn resources
   - Uses SPAWN_OP_FREE opcode
   - Returns result<_, process-error>

Helper functions:
- mapProcessError() - Map error codes to process-error enum
  (-10/-11/-12 → permission-denied, -2 → command-not-found, etc.)
- parseJSONOutput() - Parse JSON: {"exitCode":N,"stdout":"...","stderr":"..."}
- unescapeJSON() - Handle escape sequences (\n, \r, \t, \", \\)
- registerProcessImpl() - Register all 6 functions with NativeRegistry

Architecture:
- Wraps existing wasi_process.zig sync API (extern functions)
- Wraps __edgebox_spawn_dispatch for async operations
- Follows crypto_impl.zig and filesystem_impl.zig patterns
- Uses Value enum for type-safe parameter/return handling

Next: Write unit tests and integration tests
